Package org.eventb.core.basis

Class SCMachineRoot

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.PlatformObject
org.rodinp.core.basis.RodinElement
org.rodinp.core.basis.InternalElement
org.eventb.core.basis.EventBElement
org.eventb.core.basis.EventBRoot
org.eventb.core.basis.SCMachineRoot
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IAccuracyElement, IConfigurationElement, IEventBRoot, IGeneratedElement, IPOStampedElement, ISCMachineRoot, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
public class SCMachineRoot extends EventBRoot implements ISCMachineRoot
Implementation of Event-B (unchecked) contexts as an extension of the Rodin database.

This class should not be used directly by any client except the Rodin database. In particular, clients should not use it, but rather use its associated interface ISCMachineRoot.

Since:
1.0

      public ISCEvent getSCEvent(String elementName)
      Description copied from interface: ISCMachineRoot
      Returns a handle to a child SC event with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Specified by:
      getSCEvent in interface ISCMachineRoot
      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC event
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC event with the given element name

    • getTypeEnvironment

      public ITypeEnvironmentBuilder getTypeEnvironment() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: ISCMachineRoot
      Returns the type environment defined by this machine file. The returned type environment is made of all carrier sets and constants defined in the seen contexts and their abstractions, together with the variables declared in this machine and its abstractions.

      It can be used subsequently to type-check the invariants and theorems of this machine. It can also be used as a basis for building the type environment of an event of this machine.

      Specified by:
      getTypeEnvironment in interface ISCMachineRoot
      Returns:
      the type environment of this machine
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or computing the type environment
      Since:
      3.0
